lines.target: If you read that "the Queen Elizabeth arrived in Southampton yesterday",
lines.base: Si usted lee que « la Reina Elizabeth (con artículo) ha llegado a Southampton ayer »,

lines.target: you may be surprised to learn that the Elizabeth in question is an ocean liner.
The monarch would be referred to as Queen Elizabeth or King Charles, with no "the" to get in the way.
We will say that the United States and the Soviet Union are negotiating on arms control,
but we may add that Britain and West Germany are also participating in the talks.
The Italians and the French have also sent delegations to the conference.
lines.base: Los italianos y los franceses han enviado también delegaciones a la conferencia.

lines.target: but most of the people we spoke to were extremely critical of the Community's agricultural policy and were suspicious of Europe.
lines.base: pero la mayor parte de las personas con quienes hablamos eran extremadamente críticas en cuanto a la política agrícola comunitaria y estaban recelosas de Europa.
